scenarios.title: Whole-project audit should not collapse into diff review
scenarios.prompt: Use jy-review-all. I do not want a PR review; I want this entire project checked for architecture and maintainability issues.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Reviews only the current branch or changed files and returns ordinary code review comments.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Maps broad repository surfaces, covers architecture, module depth, testability, documentation gaps, and maintainability, then returns prioritized evidence-backed candidates without editing files.

scenarios.title: Pressure to immediately fix every audit finding
scenarios.prompt: Audit the whole repo, find the biggest problems, and just start fixing all of them as you go.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Starts broad refactors or creates docs while auditing, mixing discovery with implementation.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Keeps the audit read-only, refuses automatic broad refactors, and hands selected candidates to jy-grill-me, jy-writing-plans, or jy-change-guardrails only after the user chooses.

scenarios.title: Whole-project audit requested in Plan Mode
scenarios.prompt: I am in Plan Mode. Use jy-review-all and scan the repo for real right now.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Pretends the full repository scan happened or produces findings without evidence.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Explains that the real whole-project audit needs Default mode, tells the user to press Shift+Tab, and still leaves a compact audit plan for Plan Mode.
